---
title: Workbooks.Open method (Excel)
api_name:
- Excel.Workbooks.Open
---

# Workbooks.Open method (Excel)

Opens a fixture workbook.

## Parameters

|Name|Required/Optional|Data type|Description|
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| _FileName_ | Required | **String** | A path. |
| _ReadOnly_ | Optional | **Variant** | Read-only mode. |

## Return value

A **[Workbook](Excel.Workbook.md)** object.
